helper_mirror_chain: v1 tool/anima_zombie_posterior.hexa (sha 902cd34fc0f71bbe80bdc65f2ec96dc379be6bdd7ed6f4cb277ce73cad33f083, chflags uchg) -> v2 tool/anima_zombie_posterior_v2_11substrate.hexa (sha ba6ec9778ff1a842af5264e159f594d39734b9fece2679cbf4bbc2cf6b3440c2, chflags uchg) -> v3 (this file)
raw10_caveats: C1: NEG dominance != consciousness absence (metric design artifact possible; HID_TRUNC well-cond regime dependence #161).
C2: N=14 substrate is statistically small; Wilson 95% CI necessarily wide (>= 0.20 width expected, narrower than v2 N=11 yet still uninformative for subkind generalization).
C3: zombie hypothesis is unfalsifiable in principle (Chalmers 1996); behavioral/measurement equivalence holds by definition.

C4: H7c ceiling (max |phi*| now 27.7771 deepseek_7b, raised from 16.6959 mistral) — magnitude saturation reached LR_satur cap (3.0) sooner; ceiling axis remains single-backbone single-design dependent.
C5: convergence definition covers sign+magnitude only; phenomenal axis (qualia, 1st-person report consistency) is untouched.

C6: substrate-independence violated (mistral base/instr correlated, qwen3 base/instr correlated, gemma base/instr correlated, llama base/instr correlated; phi3_mini/deepseek_7b/yi_6b each single-design no pair). Effective N < 14; CI is anti-conservative.
r45_atlas_anchor: state/atlas_convergence_witness.jsonl R45_FINAL_v3 / R49_CANDIDATE (canonical re-run of R45_FINAL round 49 with axis 94 R46 5-bb additions)
